gaps: AC-1: Chat page lacked page root data-bubble-id bTHDV on shell wrapper

evidence: frontend/src/pages/Chat.tsx — passes pageBubbleId bTHDV to DashboardLayout via chatShellProps

frontend/src/components/AppSidebar.tsx — accepts bubbleId override (defaults ai_RNbBKLUe for other pages)
